_comment: PLACEHOLDER — Replace this file with the real google-services.json downloaded from your Firebase project console at https://console.firebase.google.com.
_steps: 1. Create a Firebase project at https://console.firebase.google.com
2. Add an Android app with package name: com.androidchat.app
3. Download the google-services.json and replace this file
5. Enable Firestore Database in Firebase console
6. Enable Firebase Storage in Firebase console
7. Enable Cloud Messaging (FCM) — enabled by default
